examples: She's a curious mixture of stubbornness and servility.
Servility towards power is a ubiquitous phenomenon.
Infatuation and worship to money led people's servility to an extreme degree.
They acknowledge their heroes who pulled in "30 million viewers a year every Christmas" but there is a jovial, irreverent tone that avoids charges of servility.
The large staff of domestic servants has its own rigid hierarchy, presided over by Mr. Carson, the butler who finds honor in the refinement of his own servility.
